w:r.w:t: In this game, players receive a secret role of either the Cheese Thief or a Sleepyhead
The Cheese Thief will steal the cheese, while the Sleepyheads m
During the subsequent discussion, the Cheese Thief will try to get aw
with the cheese undetected and the Sleepyheads will try to hunt the thief down together.
upside down on the table and secretly peek at the dice result inside (i.e. this is the
All players (including the Moderator) should keep their eyes closed during the night
when the Moderator calls the time that matches their dice result.
The night phase now begins and you should all go to sleep.
For those who have rolled a 1, open your eyes and act now. 10, 9, 8…
For those who have rolled a 2, open your eyes and act now. 10, 9, 8…
Oh no, the cheese has been stolen
You may start the discussion to find the Cheese Thief.
The night phase now begins and you should all go to sleep.
For those who have rolled a 1, open your eyes and act now. 10, 9, 8…
For those who have rolled a 2, open your eyes and act now. 10, 9, 8…
Oh no, the cheese has been stolen
You may start the discussion to find the Cheese Thief.
When a player’s time is called, they will act according to their character card.
must do nothing or simply smile at them silently.
For a 5 to 8-player game, the following rules are added to introduce one or more
“Everyone please reach out your right hand toward
Cheese Thief, please open your eyes and choose your Follower by silentl
open your eyes and make eye contact with the Cheese Thief.
seconds down). Now you two please close your eyes.”
eyes and make eye contact with the Cheese Thief.
During the discussion, while the Sleepyheads make every effort to identify and pin
the Cheese Thief, the Cheese Thief can also try to cover up and even find a scapegoat
Players can decide on the duration of the discussion and when
The discussion ends in a vote in which each player must participate to show (or pretend t
show) who they think the Cheese Thief is.
The result decides which of the opposing tea
everyone points simultaneously to another player of their choice and the player with th
highest number of votes reveals their character card.
If more than one player receives th
If the Cheese Thief receives the highest number of votes, regardless of any other car
As long as the Cheese Thief is not revealed, even if a Follower receives the most
the Cheese Thief can wake up at both hours as shown on their dice; if both
The Fall Mouse wins alone if they receive the highest
